question: Write a C++ program that takes three integer side lengths of a triangle as input and determines if it is an equilateral, isosceles, or scalene triangle. Assume valid triangle inequalities are met.
errors: The order of conditions in the if-else if chain is incorrect. The check for 'Isosceles' (a == b || b == c || a == c) precedes the check for 'Equilateral' (a == b && b == c). Since an equilateral triangle also satisfies the isosceles condition, it will be misclassified as 'Isosceles'. The 'Equilateral' branch will never be reached for valid equilateral inputs.
